document.document_description: An invoice issued by a seller to a buyer outlining products or services, quantities, prices, and payment terms.

fields.name: invoice_number
fields.description: Unique identifier or reference number for this invoice.

fields.name: invoice_date
fields.description: The invoice creation or issue date.

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: Date by which payment is expected.

fields.name: total_amount
fields.description: The total amount due on the invoice.

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: Full name of the person or company being billed.

fields.name: vendor_name
fields.description: Name of the company that issued the invoice.

fields.name: line_items
fields.description: Each product or service line on the invoice.
